subtitle: Auto-update repo for AltStore and ESign
description: Welcome to my repo! Here you'll find all of my apps.

apps.name: cisum
apps.subtitle: An awesome app to stream music for free without ads.
apps.localizedDescription: This is an awesome app only available on AltStore/ESign right now.

versions.localizedDescription: This is the fourth beta that contains some changes to the music progress slider and the volume slider, making them infinitely better!!!
This is the third beta with some more fixes to the Gradient Background of the player and random animations and code refactor.

Latest beta with fixes

iOS 16.x stll not supported. (will work on it once iOS 17+ version is completed)

Initial release.
There will be many many bugs that i will be fixing slowly but you guys can try this out and share your thoughts and suggestions please.

I will try to add the ones which i think are good and i can make.
Many features like playlists and albums are not present as i am still working on them.
